summary: Completed comprehensive documentation cleanup across 8 phases. Removed FMP/ and LogosTest references from 13 files, updated outdated content in 5 READMEs, created 31 new READMEs, and updated ROAD_MAP.md. Total README count increased from ~51 to 82.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary with all 8 phases documented

completion_data.completion_summary: Cleaned up comments and improved documentation across the entire codebase. Removed all references to non-existent FMP/ and LogosTest/ directories, fixed case consistency issues in docs/ links, created 31 new README.md files for directories that were missing them (including Syntax, Semantics, ProofSystem, Examples, Theorems, and various Metalogic subdirectories), updated outdated sorry counts and file listings, and refreshed ROAD_MAP.md with current project state.

next_steps: Review implementation and verify all documentation is accurate
